ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school type */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for school contact */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for school contact */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the school's website */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was established */,
  "accreditation_status" TEXT /* Accreditation status of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "school_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  "accreditation_body" TEXT /* Body responsible for accreditation */,
  "accreditation_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for accreditation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_types" (
  "program_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program type */,
  "program_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the program type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program type */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the program */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Estimated cost of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "program_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program type */,
  "degree_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the degree level */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  "admission_requirements" TEXT /* Admission requirements for the program */,
  "course_outline" TEXT /* Outline of the courses offered in the program */,
  "job_placement_rate" TEXT /* Job placement rate of graduates from the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_program_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_type_id") REFERENCES program_types ("program_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_degree_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("degree_level_id") REFERENCES degree_levels ("degree_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "degree_levels" (
  "degree_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each degree level */,
  "degree_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the degree level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the degree level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("degree_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the student was admitted to the program */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date the student graduated from the program */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., enrolled, graduated, dropped out) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the student is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the program */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date the student graduated from the program */,
  "grade_point_average" TEXT /* GPA of the student */,
  "credits_earned" INTEGER /* Credits earned by the student */,
  "enrollment_status" TEXT /* Current enrollment status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics event */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program being tracked */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the program */,
  "graduation_count" INTEGER /* Number of students graduated from the program */,
  "average_gpa" TEXT /* Average GPA of students in the program */,
  "average_credits_earned" TEXT /* Average credits earned by students in the program */,
  "retention_rate" TEXT /* Retention rate of students in the program */,
  "graduation_rate" TEXT /* Graduation rate of students in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communications" (
  "communication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sending the message */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipient */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message being sent */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the message was sent */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the communication */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the message has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("communication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
